questions.question: шЎ?$A, B$ фКфИчИхЎЙ, фИ?$P(A)=p, P(B)=q$, х?$P((\bar{A} \cup B) \cap(A \cup \bar{B}))=()$.
questions.analysis:
ххчЎ $(\bar{A} \cup B) \cap(A \cup \bar{B})$, ц
$$
\begin{aligned}
&(\bar{A} \cup B) \cap(A \cup \bar{B})=\bar{A} \cdot \bar{B} \cup A B, \\
& \text { фКцЏ } P((\bar{A} \cup B) \cap(A \cup \bar{B}))=P(\bar{A} \cdot \bar{B} \cup A B) \\
&=P(\bar{A} \cdot \bar{B})+P(A B)-P(\bar{A} \cdot \bar{B} A B) \\
&=P(\overline{A \cup B})+0-0=1-P(A \cup B) \\
&=1-[P(A)+P(B)-P(A B)] \\
&=1-(p+q-0)=1-(p+q) .
\end{aligned}
$$

questions.question: шЎ?$P(A)=p, P(B)=q, P(A \cup B)=r$, х?$P(A \bar{B}), P(\bar{A} \cdot \bar{B}), P(\bar{A} \cup \bar{B}), P(A \cup \bar{B})$ чхМххЋфИК ( ).
